nasb.text: He shall therefore tear down the house, its stones, and its timbers, and all the plaster of the house, and he shall take them outside the city to an unclean place.

esv.text: And he shall break down the house, its stones and timber and all the plaster of the house, and he shall carry them out of the city to an unclean place.

cnv.text: 要把房屋拆毀，把房屋裡的石頭、木頭，以及所有的灰泥都搬到城外不潔淨的地方去。

ccb.text: 房主要拆掉房子，把石块、木料和所有灰泥都丢到城外不洁净的地方。
